author: SrPernax
description: Turn your soundtrack into a worldbuilding tool. Manage OSTs, track leitmotifs, and weave musical lore into your vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: SrPernax
manifest.description: Turn your soundtrack into a worldbuilding tool. Manage OSTs, track leitmotifs, and weave musical lore into your vault.
manifest.name: StoryScore

name: StoryScore

releases.author: SrPernax
releases.description:
FEATURES

- Manager Update: The main Manager now has tabs to navigate between Tracks, Soundtracks, and Leitmotifs.
- New Info Panels: Soundtracks and Leitmotifs now have their own Information Modals to manage all their data in one place (similar to Tracks).
- Codeblock Expansion: You can now insert Soundtrack (ST-) and Leitmotif (LM-) cards directly into your notes using the storyscore codeblock.
- News Tab: Added a new 'News' tab in the plugin settings to see the latest updates.
- Mobile Support: Filter buttons in the Manager are now horizontally scrollable to prevent UI issues on mobile devices.

FIXES
- Fixed a critical bug that prevented saving or updating track lyrics from the information panel.
- Fixed an issue where "custom" entity types in Leitmotifs were not being saved correctly in the file.
- Fixed Diegesis translations for Spanish users ("Diegético" / "Extradiegético"), with backwards compatibility for older files.
- Cleaned up strict styling warnings and minor code issues.
releases.name: 1.1.0 - New manager and note cards

releases.author: SrPernax
releases.description: All .png images in the plugin were replaced with SVGs to avoid compilation issues.
releases.name: 1.0.1 - UI Fix

releases.author: SrPernax
releases.description:
First release of StoryScore

This plugin bridges the gap between your narrative process and your musical workflow, allowing composers, audio directors, and writers to manage soundtracks, tracks, and leitmotifs directly inside their Obsidian vault.

- Centralized Manager View: Access all your music from a unified dashboard. Filter by soundtrack, listen to your tracks, and manage your progress at a glance.
- Track & Soundtrack Creation: Create and edit musical projects effortlessly without writing YAML.
- Leitmotif System: Connect musical motifs to characters, locations, or items, including specialized fields for musical annotations and narrative descriptions.
- Embedded Track Cards: Insert playable, beautiful track cards anywhere in your notes using the Command Palette or a storyscore codeblock. Perfect for character profiles or scene descriptions!
- Localized: StoryScore ships with support for both English and Spanish.
releases.name: 1.0.0 - Initial Release
